human_approval_required_for: creating docs/CONTEXT.md (HARD GATE — show proposal, ask before writing)
approving each ADR before it lands in docs/adr/

fork_policy.all_invocations: fork-by-design — runs as a forked subagent so the bootstrap analysis does not pollute the main session context

boundaries.produces: docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/adr/ skeleton, initial ADRs from approved decisions
boundaries.does_not_produce: ongoing CONTEXT.md updates (those happen inline during workflow phases via discover mode domain or architecture-review)
boundaries.does_not_handle: skill catalog setup (use skill-creator), git hooks (use quality-gates)
